α : Type
s : Skeleton
idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s
leafValue : α
proof : List α
f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.getPutativeRoot α s idx leafValue proof) =
    InductiveMerkleTree.getPutativeRoot_with_hash α s idx leafValue proof fun left right => @f (left, right)

have h : ∀ {s : Skeleton} (idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s) (leafValue : α) (proof : List α), (runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot idx leafValue proof)) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash idx leafValue proof (fun left right => f ⟨left, right⟩) := by
    intro s
    refine' fun idx leafValue proof => by
      induction proof generalizing s with
      | nil =>
        simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
      | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
        cases s with
        | leaf =>
          cases idx with
          | ofLeaf =>
            simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
          | ofLeft idxLeft => contradiction
          | ofRight idxRight => contradiction
        | internal s_left s_right =>
          cases idx with
          | ofLeft idxLeft =>
            simp [getPutativeRoot, singleHash, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, ih, SkeletonLeafIndex]
            <;>
            simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure]
            <;>
            aesop
          | ofRight idxRight =>
            simp [getPutativeRoot, singleHash, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, ih, SkeletonLeafIndex]
            <;>
            simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure]
            <;>
            aesop
  exact h idx leafValue proof
